name: kiro-md-translator-plugin
description: Rendered Markdown preview with synchronous translation for the Kiro/VS Code IDE.

commands.title: Markdown Translator: Exclude Selection from Translation

enumDescriptions: Custom HTTP endpoint (set Custom Endpoint below).
Local Ollama server (set Ollama Endpoint and Model below). No API key required.
kiro-md-translator.providerType.markdownDescription: The translation service to use. Per-provider connection settings and API keys are in **Provider settings** below.

kiro-md-translator.ollamaEndpoint.markdownDescription:
**Ollama** (local, no API key) — [Test connection](command:kiro-md-translator.testConnection?%5B%22ollama%22%5D)

Base URL of the local Ollama server. `http://` is allowed for localhost. Ignored unless Provider Type is `ollama`.

kiro-md-translator.ollamaModel.markdownDescription: Ollama model used for translation (must be pulled locally, e.g. `ollama pull llama3.1`). Ignored unless Provider Type is `ollama`.

kiro-md-translator.customEndpoint.markdownDescription:
**API keys** are stored in the OS keychain, never in `settings.json`:

- **DeepL** — [Set key](command:kiro-md-translator.setApiKey?%5B%22deepl%22%5D) · [Test connection](command:kiro-md-translator.testConnection?%5B%22deepl%22%5D)
- **Google** — [Set key](command:kiro-md-translator.setApiKey?%5B%22google%22%5D) · [Test connection](command:kiro-md-translator.testConnection?%5B%22google%22%5D)

---

**Custom** HTTP provider — [Set key](command:kiro-md-translator.setApiKey?%5B%22custom%22%5D) · [Test connection](command:kiro-md-translator.testConnection?%5B%22custom%22%5D)

Base URL for the endpoint. Ignored unless Provider Type is `custom`.

kiro-md-translator.storageLanguage.markdownDescription: Language the file is stored in on disk (the translation source). Use a **base** language code, e.g. `en`, `de`, `ru` — regional variants like `en-US` are not valid as a source.

kiro-md-translator.targetLanguage.markdownDescription: Language to display translations in. Leave empty to disable translation. Regional codes are allowed here, e.g. `en-US`, `pt-BR`.

enumDescriptions: Translate only when you click the Translate button.
Translate automatically on open and on every edit.

kiro-md-translator.glossary.markdownDescription: Do-not-translate terms (product names, identifiers, brands). Each term is kept **verbatim** in the translated output and is never sent as translatable text to the provider.

kiro-md-translator.commentsEnabled.markdownDescription: Show the per-block comment control in the preview. When off, the comment icon is hidden and comments cannot be added or opened; the paragraph edit (pencil) control is unaffected. Existing comments in the file or sidecar are kept, just not shown.

enumDescriptions: Store comments in a separate `<name>.md.comments.json` file next to the document (default). The Markdown file itself is never modified.
Embed comments inside the Markdown file as invisible HTML comments, so a single file carries its comments.

Keep comments in the editor's own storage. Nothing is written next to the document and the Markdown file is never modified — the only mode that works on documents you cannot write to (dependencies, a cloned repo, a read-only or remote file). Drafts stay on this machine and do NOT travel with the file.
kiro-md-translator.commentStorage.markdownDescription: Where block comments are saved: in a **separate file** next to the document (default), **inside the Markdown file** itself, or as a **draft** in the editor's own storage (nothing is written to disk beside the document).

enumDescriptions: Place each comment right after its paragraph (default).
Collect all comments in one block at the end of the file.
kiro-md-translator.commentPlacement.markdownDescription: Where inline comments are written. Applies only when Comment Storage is `inline`.
